turns.q: My discount code isn't applying at checkout — what are the usual reasons?
turns.replyTail:
in products only
there’s a minimum order amount required
it’s one-time use or has already been used
it’s for first-time orders only
it was entered with an extra space or typo
another discount is already applied, and codes usually can’t be stacked
shipping charges usually aren’t discounted by product promo codes

If you want, send me:

the exact code
a screenshot of the error
where you got it from

and I’ll check it with you. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

turns.q: Do you have any current promotions or a first-order discount?
turns.replyTail:
s! Right now we’re running a Buy More, Save More promotion sitewide through mid-August:

Spend $30+ → Free Shipping

Spend $200+ → $50 off

turns.q: Do you ship internationally, and who covers customs or duties?
turns.replyTail:
ere’s anything else I can help with!

Do you ship internationally, and who covers customs or duties?

We currently only ship to the U.S. and Canada from our website. For orders to Canada, please note that any customs duties, import taxes, or additional fees are not covered by us and may be collected upon delivery.

If you're outside the U.S. or Canada, we recommend checking Amazon to see if they can deliver our products to your area. Let me know if you have any other questions!

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept most major credit and debit cards, as well as Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal at checkout. If you have a specific payment method in mind, let me know and I can confirm if it's accepted!

turns.q: Can I use more than one discount code on an order?
turns.replyTail:
& Refund Policy

These pages cover everything about shipping options, costs, timelines, and how returns work. If you have a specific question after checking them out, just let me know!

Can I use more than one discount code on an order?

Discount codes can’t be combined on a single order. If you’re using the current Buy More, Save More promotion, that discount is applied automatically and can’t be stacked with other codes or offers. Let me know if you have any other questions!
